# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
        - https://staging.app.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Language
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - Referer
        - User-Agent
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-Request-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-Correlation-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
      limit_by: consumer
      minute: 600
      hour: 10000

services:
  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders:8080
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Language
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - Referer
            - User-Agent
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-Correlation-Id
            - X-Request-Id
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-Correlation-Id
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false

      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - x-api-key
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
    routes:
      - name: orders-public
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Accept-Language
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - Referer
                - User-Agent
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Correlation-Id
                - X-Request-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              minute: 120
              hour: 1000
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

      - name: orders-admin
        paths:
          - /api/admin/orders
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:

              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS

                - User-Agent

                - X-Correlation-Id
                - X-Request-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              minute: 60
              hour: 500
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

  - name: users-service
    url: http://users:8080
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - x-api-key
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false

      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          policy: local
          limit_by: consumer
          minute: 240
          hour: 3000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
    routes:
      - name: users-auth
        paths:
          - /api/users
        strip_path: false
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            enabled: true
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Accept-Language
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - Referer

                - X-Request-Id
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-Correlation-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false

          - name: rate-limiting
            enabled: true
            config:
              policy: local
              limit_by: consumer
              minute: 100
              hour: 1000
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false
